runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 461m at this track behind Romford beaten 13 lengths (26.90). Last couple have been below par. Deserves another chance.

runners.formComment: Strong performance to post a big 4 lengths win at this track over 340m (19.30) beating Deadly Power in Grade 5 on April 3. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

runners.formComment: In the money last time at Launceston (16.25) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 1.5 lengths second. Goes very well off the draw boasting three wins and two places from six starts. Tough field and looking to others this time.
